description: Pre-energization checklists, startup sequences, instrument commissioning, common mistakes

documentation: All punch list items cleared or accepted
Relay settings and coordination study complete
physical_inspection: All wire terminated and labeled both ends
Space heaters energized on large motors/transformers
All starters OFF, all disconnects OPEN

electrical_startup_sequence: 2. Energize main transformer — check oil, close primary, soak 1-4 hours (inrush can be 8-12x rated)
3. Energize main switchgear bus — verify voltage all phases, check phase rotation
4. Energize distribution panels/MCCs one feeder at a time — verify voltage at each
5. Energize branch circuits — lighting/receptacles first, then control power, then instrument power
6. Motor circuits individually — bump test (1-2 sec), verify rotation, expect 5-7x FLA starting current
motor_bump_test: Verify alignment, coupling guard, valve positions
If wrong: LOCK OUT, swap two phases at STARTER (not motor)
Run uncoupled if possible, check vibration/temp/amps

phase_1_bench_calibration: Configure range, units, damping, fail mode, tag
phase_2_installation_verification: Tubing: correct material, slope, drain/vent, heat trace
Wiring: correct cable, shield grounding one end only
phase_3_loop_check: Apply simulated signal at field device
Verify signal at correct DCS/PLC input, tag, units
Command output from DCS, verify field response
Document loop number, cable, DCS point, readings
phase_4_functional_test: Fail-safe: simulate cable break and power loss
Control valve stroke test 0-100%, verify fail position
phase_5_tie_in: Place in manual/commissioned — NOT auto until process ready

common_commissioning_mistakes: Not testing protective relays before energizing
Forgetting to remove shipping locks/blocks from breakers
Wrong CT polarity — metering errors, relay misoperation
Motor bump without confirming process is safe
Instrument shield grounded at both ends — noisy signal
Not documenting as-found calibration — no baseline
Testing SIS with bypasses that never get removed
Commissioning control loops in AUTO before process stable
Not verifying fail-safe position of control valves
Forgetting to commission heat tracing before cold weather
